finding_results.notes: Removed the imagined episode-title/thesis-restatement run after Nate's confession. The chapter now lands on concrete aftermath already present in the scene: the casserole, draft board, unanswered Mia text, darkening lake, and the renewed scratch of Mallick's pen.

summary: Trimmed the closing so Nate's exposure lands as an external aftermath image rather than a second-pass self-interpretation.
